word.definition: Longueur refers to a boring part of something (such as a book or play). It is usually used in the plural form.

sports_fact.text: Frank Zamboni invented his ice-resurfacing machine in 1949 for his Southern California rink. The family company still makes them, and his name became the word.

market.headline: One Investor’s Race to Get $80 Million Out of Private Credit
market.summary: Many are waiting in line to get their money out of the once-popular asset class as redemption requests accelerate.

quote.text: If there's not love present, it's much, much harder to function. When there's love present, it's easier to deal with life.
quote.author: Brian Wilson

history.text: World War II: During the Continuation War, the Soviet Union demands unconditional surrender from Finland during the beginning of partially successful Vyborg–Petrozavodsk Offensive. The Finnish government refuses.
